---
title: "PhillyStat360 — 04g: Temporal validation (R port)"
output: html_document
---

R port of `code/python/04g_temporal_validation.ipynb`. Splits parcels by
violation recency and reports AUC + observed vs predicted vacancy on each
cohort as a proxy for temporal generalization.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r libs}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(yardstick)
})

ROOT       <- here::here()
DATA_PATH  <- file.path(ROOT, "data")
PY_PATH    <- file.path(ROOT, "data_py")
OUT_PATH   <- PY_PATH
GRAPH_PATH <- file.path(ROOT, "graphs", "python")
dir.create(GRAPH_PATH, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

## 1. Load predictions + recency

```{r load}
preds <- read_csv(file.path(PY_PATH, "predictions_04b.csv"),
                  show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(parcel_number = str_trim(as.character(parcel_number)))

feat <- read_csv(file.path(DATA_PATH, "features_residential.csv"),
                 col_select = c("parcel_number", "days_since_last_viol"),
                 show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(parcel_number = str_trim(as.character(parcel_number)))

df <- preds |> left_join(feat, by = "parcel_number")
sentinel <- max(df$days_since_last_viol, na.rm = TRUE)
cat(sprintf("Sentinel (no violations): %.0f days\n", sentinel))
```

## 2. Define cohorts

```{r cohorts}
NEW_THRESHOLD <- 520L
OLD_THRESHOLD <- 1100L

new_cohort <- df |> filter(between(days_since_last_viol, 1, NEW_THRESHOLD))
old_cohort <- df |> filter(days_since_last_viol > OLD_THRESHOLD |
                             is.na(days_since_last_viol))
cat(sprintf("New: %d (%.1f%%) ovs=%.4f%% | Old: %d (%.1f%%) ovs=%.4f%%\n",
            nrow(new_cohort), 100 * nrow(new_cohort) / nrow(df),
            100 * mean(new_cohort$ovs),
            nrow(old_cohort), 100 * nrow(old_cohort) / nrow(df),
            100 * mean(old_cohort$ovs)))
```

## 3. Cohort metrics

```{r metrics}
cohort_metrics <- function(g) {
  auc <- if (length(unique(g$ovs)) == 2) {
    as.numeric(yardstick::roc_auc_vec(
      factor(g$ovs, levels = c(1, 0)), g$ensemble_prob, event_level = "first"))
  } else NA_real_
  tibble(
    n = nrow(g),
    n_pos = sum(g$ovs == 1),
    obs_rate = mean(g$ovs == 1),
    mean_pred = mean(g$ensemble_prob),
    auc = auc,
    brier = mean((g$ovs - g$ensemble_prob)^2)
  )
}

tab <- bind_rows(
  cohort_metrics(old_cohort) |> mutate(cohort = "old (train surrogate)"),
  cohort_metrics(new_cohort) |> mutate(cohort = "new (test surrogate)")
) |> select(cohort, everything())
print(tab)
write_csv(tab, file.path(OUT_PATH, "temporal_validation.csv"))
```

## 4. Plot

```{r plot, fig.width=13, fig.height=5}
auc_p <- ggplot(tab, aes(cohort, auc, fill = cohort)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("old (train surrogate)" = "#999999",
                               "new (test surrogate)" = "#1f77b4"),
                    guide = "none") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.7, linetype = "dashed", color = "tomato") +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  labs(title = "AUC by cohort", y = "AUC", x = NULL) +
  theme_minimal()

rates_p <- tab |>
  select(cohort, obs_rate, mean_pred) |>
  pivot_longer(-cohort, names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") |>
  ggplot(aes(cohort, value, fill = metric)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(obs_rate = "#2166ac", mean_pred = "#d6604d"),
                    labels = c("Observed", "Predicted")) +
  labs(title = "Observed vs predicted by cohort", y = "Rate", x = NULL,
       fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal()

combined <- patchwork::wrap_plots(auc_p, rates_p, ncol = 2)
ggsave(file.path(GRAPH_PATH, "temporal_validation.png"), combined,
       width = 13, height = 5, dpi = 200)
combined
```
